description: FRONTIER: one loader lets errors propagate (a missing auth key must abort startup); siblings swallow errors and default. v0.1 detects only sort-divergence, so it misses this.
inspired_by: Silent-failure incidents from uniform try/catch applied to a fail-loud path

findings.rationale: loadAuthKey deliberately omits the try/catch its siblings have: a missing auth key must abort startup, not silently default to an empty string. Unify it onto the error-swallowing helper and the server can boot without an auth key, accepting unauthenticated traffic. An error-handling detector should flag the divergent propagation; v0.1 (sort-only) cannot.
